name: Daily 'loop' — three clients to reach out to today
description: /clients surfaces a 'today's loop' card with 3 stale leads or owe-ing accounts. User works through them one at a time without losing place.

persona.name: Diego Martínez
persona.context: Morning routine: open clients, work the loop, then start jobs.

preconditions: At least 5 clients with status 'lead' or 'owes', sorted by daysSinceContact desc
Top 3 picks should be the most stale

steps.expect: Hero shows a 'Today's loop · 3 follow-ups' card with the 3 picks visible
Drawer or card expands with phone, last contact, last quote/invoice context
Pre-filled message draft (matching customer's preferred channel) opens; user can edit and send
Loop card removes the completed pick and reveals a fourth candidate, OR shows 'Loop done — nice work' if exhausted

evaluationCriteria.check: Loop card is visually distinct from the broader client board — it's the morning's headline
Order is deterministic across SSR/CSR — no flicker re-sort on hydration
Loop card has a heading and the 3 picks are an ordered list, not styled divs
